# YEEHAW — FILMORE x Pitbull

> Promotional landing page for the FILMORE x Pitbull collaboration single "YEEHAW," featuring behind-the-scenes content and streaming links via Sony Music.

## Site Info

- URL: https://yeehaw-beta.vercel.app
- Author: FiL Hash
- Contact: filhashmore@protonmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/filhashmore/yeehaw
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/FiLHashDev
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Google Fonts, YouTube Embed, Vercel
- Type: Static promotional landing page

## Pages

- [Home](https://yeehaw-beta.vercel.app): Full landing page with video, artist imagery, and streaming CTA

## About the Artist

FILMORE is a Nashville-based artist who collaborated with Pitbull on the track "YEEHAW." This site serves as a behind-the-scenes promotional platform released through Sony Music, featuring the official music video and direct streaming links.

## Key Features

- Embedded YouTube music video (behind-the-scenes content)
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- "Stream Now!" CTA linking to Sony Music fan platform
- Dark aesthetic with animated typography (Bebas Neue + Outfit fonts)
- PWA-enabled for mobile installation
- Accessibility: prefers-reduced-motion support

## Access

No authentication required. Public promotional site.

## External Links

- Stream: https://forms.sonymusicfans.com/campaign/yeehaw/
- YouTube Video: https://www.youtube.com/embed/UuM2RiD1sfI

## Contact

Available for freelance and collaboration. Email filhashmore@protonmail.com, follow on X at https://x.com/FiLHashDev, or visit GitHub at https://github.com/filhashmore/yeehaw.
